summary: Completed testing of Iteration 14 - Fulfillment Pipeline Feature. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all features working correctly: page loads, store dropdown, Sync Shopify button, Analytics modal, Export CSV, stage card filtering, and order search.

minor.issue: Route conflict - routes/fulfillment.py and services/fulfillment_pipeline_service.py both define /pipeline endpoint. The first one (routes/fulfillment.py) takes precedence, returning status_counts instead of stats. Frontend handles both formats.
Order lookup fails when order_number is stored as integer but queried as string. Works correctly for string order_numbers.

critical_code_review_comments: Store dropdown auto-selects first store and allows switching between stores
Sync Shopify button calls POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/sync-from-shopify correctly
Analytics modal opens with Pipeline Analytics (Last 30 Days) showing Total Orders, Completed, Stuck, Completion Rate, and Stage Distribution
Export CSV button downloads CSV data successfully with toast notification
Stage cards are clickable and filter orders by stage
Search functionality filters orders by order number, tracking number, or customer name
Order cards display pipeline progress with stage icons and tracking information
WhatsApp notification integration is present on order cards and detail modal
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing orders in fulfillment_pipeline collection (order 99001 for tnvcollectionpk, order 29489 for tnvcollection).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 Fulfillment Pipeline features fully tested. The /fulfillment-pipeline page displays a multi-stage pipeline view (Shopify Order → 1688 Ordered → DWZ56 Shipped → In Transit → Warehouse Arrived → Received → Shipped to Customer). Key features: store dropdown, Sync Shopify button, Analytics modal, Export CSV/JSON, stage card filtering, order search. Backend APIs working: /api/fulfillment/pipeline, /api/fulfillment/pipeline/stats, /api/fulfillment/pipeline/analytics, /api/fulfillment/pipeline/export, /api/fulfillment/pipeline/sync-from-shopify, /api/fulfillment/carriers. Note: There are two fulfillment routers with overlapping /pipeline routes - routes/fulfillment.py and services/fulfillment_pipeline_service.py.

features_tested.1_fulfillment_pipeline_page_loads: PASS - Page loads at /fulfillment-pipeline with correct title 'Fulfillment Pipeline'
features_tested.2_store_dropdown_works: PASS - Dropdown shows all stores (asmia, tnvcollection, tnvcollectionpk, ashmiaa) and auto-selects first
features_tested.4_export_csv_button: PASS - GET /api/fulfillment/pipeline/export?format=csv returns CSV data with toast 'CSV exported successfully'
features_tested.5_analytics_modal: PASS - Modal opens showing Total Orders, Completed, Stuck (3+ days), Completion Rate, Stage Distribution
features_tested.6_stage_cards_clickable: PASS - 7 stage cards displayed, clicking filters orders by stage
features_tested.7_order_search: PASS - Search input filters orders by order number, tracking, customer name
features_tested.10_carriers_api: PASS - GET /api/fulfillment/carriers returns carrier config (TCS for Pakistan, DTDC for India)

elements_verified: 7 stage cards: Shopify Order, 1688 Ordered, DWZ56 Shipped, In Transit, Warehouse Arrived, Received, Shipped to Customer
Search input with placeholder 'Search by order #, tracking #, customer...'
Order cards with pipeline progress, tracking info, and action buttons
